message:
test(membrane): add localization chooser hardened-bonus and EWMA boundary tests

Two new tests for the localization chooser:
- hardened_summary_adds_fixed_protective_bonus: verify that hardened mode
  adds a +2 raw-score bonus (scaled by Euler weight) to protective arms
  3 and 4 compared to strict mode under identical observations
- ewma_crosses_quantization_boundary_only_after_sustained_pressure: verify
  that 5 high-risk samples don't yet lift EWMA risk above the 750-milli
  quantization boundary, but 7 sustained samples do

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
